{"code":"from hermes_tools import terminal

# Clone both repos in parallel to compare them
print("Fetching repositories...\n")

# Clone the skills repo
skills_result = terminal(
    command="git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/rmyndharis/antigravity-skills.git",
    workdir="/tmp",
    timeout=60
)

# Clone your prompt protocol repo
protocol_result = terminal(
    command="git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/SPhillips1337/AntigravityAgentsPromptProtocol.git",
    workdir="/tmp",
    timeout=60
)

print("Repositories cloned. Now analyzing structure...\n")

# Get tree of skills repo
skills_tree = terminal(
    command="find /tmp/antigravity-skills -type f -name '*.md' | head -20",
    workdir="/tmp"
)

# Get tree of protocol repo
protocol_tree = terminal(
    command="find /tmp/AntigravityAgentsPromptProtocol -type f -name '*.md' | head -20",
    workdir="/tmp"
)

print("Skills repo markdown files:")
print(skills_tree["output"])
print("\n" + "="*60 + "\n")
print("Protocol repo markdown files:")
print(protocol_tree["output"])"}

--- README.md (first 80 lines) ---
     1|# Antigravity Skill Vault
     2|
     3|A curated collection of **Agent Skills** for **Google Antigravity**, ported from the [Claude Code Agents](https://github.com/wshobson/agents) repository.
     4|
     5|This vault transforms the extensive Claude Code ecosystem into **Antigravity Skills**, providing your agent with repeatable workflows, domain expertise, and specialized tools.
     6|
     7|---
     8|
     9|## 🚀 Overview
    10|
    11|This repository contains **300+ specialized skills** across software development, operations, security, and business domains. Each skill is a directory-based package that teaches Antigravity's agent how to perform specific tasks.
    12|
    13|### What's Included?
    14|
    15|The skills are derived from three types of Claude Code components, all unified into the Antigravity Skill format:
    16|
    17|1.  **Domain Skills** (e.g., `k8s-manifest-generator`, `async-python-patterns`): Specialized knowledge packages.
    18|2.  **Specialist Agents** (e.g., `backend-architect`, `security-auditor`): Persona-based instruction sets for complex reasoning.
    19|3.  **Commands & Workflows** (e.g., `full-stack-orchestration-full-stack-feature`, `conductor-implement`): Structured, multi-step procedures.
    20|
    21|---
    22|
    23|## 📂 Categories
    24|
    25|Skills are flattened in the `skills/` directory, but cover these broad categories:
    26|
    27|### 💻 Development & Languages
    28|- **Python**: `python-pro`, `fastapi-pro`, `async-python-patterns`, `uv-package-manager`
    29|- **JavaScript/TypeScript**: `typescript-pro`, `react-modernization`, `nextjs-app-router-patterns`

    36|- **CI/CD**: `cicd-automation-workflow-automate`, `github-actions-templates`, `gitlab-ci-patterns`
    37|
    38|### 🔒 Security & Quality
    39|- **Security**: `security-auditor`, `sast-configuration`, `security-scanning-security-hardening`
    40|- **Code Quality**: `code-review-ai-ai-review`, `code-refactoring-refactor-clean`, `codebase-cleanup-tech-debt`
    41|- **Testing**: `unit-testing-test-generate`, `tdd-workflows-tdd-cycle`, `e2e-testing-patterns`
    42|
    43|### 🔄 Workflows & Architecture
    44|- **Conductor**: `conductor-implement`, `context-driven-development` (Context-Driven Development)
    45|- **Architecture**: `c4-architecture-c4-architecture`, `microservices-patterns`, `api-design-principles`
    46|- **Orchestration**: `full-stack-orchestration-full-stack-feature`, `incident-response-incident-response`
    47|
    48|### 📊 Data & AI
    49|- **Data Engineering**: `data-engineer`, `spark-optimization`, `dbt-transformation-patterns`
    50|- **AI/ML**: `ml-pipeline-workflow`, `prompt-engineering-patterns`, `rag-implementation`
    51|
    52|---
    53|
    54|## 🎯 Install Strategically (Token Efficient)
    55|
    56|Antigravity loads metadata (name + description) from every installed skill at session start. More skills means more token usage and a higher chance of irrelevant auto-activation. Prefer targeted installs via search, tags, or bundles. `install --all` is advanced and not recommended for most projects.
    57|
    58|## 🧭 Catalog & Discovery
    59|
    60|This repo ships a generated catalog for discovery:
    61|
    62|- `CATALOG.md` (human-readable index)
    63|- `catalog.json` (machine-readable index used by the CLI)
    64|- `bundles.json` (curated bundles)
    65|- `aliases.json` (short names that map to long skill IDs)
    66|
    67|Regenerate after adding/editing skills:
    68|
    69|```bash
    70|npm run build:catalog
    71|```
    72|
    73|## 🛠️ How to Use
    74|
    75|When a conversation starts, Antigravity loads the **metadata** (name & description) from all skills.
    76|ANTIGRAVITY automatically activates a skill when your request matches its description.
    77|
    78|**Examples:**
    79|
    80|*   *"Help me design a REST API for a user service"* → Activates `api-design-principles` and `backend-architect`.
